heroDescription: ChanoX2 is a high-performance, open-source desktop gaming library and launcher. Automatically catalog and manage Unity, Unreal, Ren'Py, and Godot games, with advanced support for game translation and cheats.
manageDesc: ChanoX2 can automatically identify game types and organize your collection by technology, size, or playtime. ChanoX2 gives you the fine-grained control you need.
featureAutoDetectDesc: Supports Unity, Unreal, Godot, Ren'Py and more
featureSmartLibraryDesc: Auto-import your games and keep them organized with tags.
featurePerformanceDesc: Zero-overhead launcher that closes itself when game starts.
releaseDesc: Stable builds and assets from GitHub
communityDesc: ChanoX2 is open source and community-driven. Report bugs, feature requests, or just come say hi.
downloadLatestVersion: Download the latest version of ChanoX2
differentOS: Looking for ChanoX2 with a different OS? ChanoX2 for
compatibilityNote: Note that ChanoX2 requires Windows 10/11, macOS Big Sur+, or a modern Linux distribution.
testBeta: Want to help test development versions?
platformGuidesDesc: Follow these simple step-by-step guides to successfully install and configure ChanoX2 on your system.
windowsGuideStep2: If SmartScreen warns you, click 'More info' and then 'Run anyway'.
windowsGuideStep3: Follow the installer steps to complete and open ChanoX2.
macGuideStep1: Double-click the downloaded DMG file and drag ChanoX2 to Applications.
macGuideStep2: If you see a security warning, go to System Settings > Privacy & Security and click 'Open Anyway'.
macGuideStep3: Open the app and grant required permissions for desktop game launching.
linuxGuideStep2: For AppImage: Right-click > Properties > Permissions and allow execution (or run 'chmod +x').
linuxGuideStep3: Double-click to start or run the setup shell script for custom protocol handler registration.
interfacePreviewDesc: Explore ChanoX2's clean, lightweight, and customisable user interface.
